metaDescription: Get the free comic! Join Read with Noah — Curious Comics.

header.heroImageAlt: Noah and Pixel the robot owl — comic adventure art

formPrimary.headline: GET THE FREE COMIC!
formPrimary.description: Join the mailing list for new issues, bonus panels, and behind-the-scenes from Noah's workshop.
formPrimary.disclaimer: We respect your inbox. Unsubscribe anytime. For grown-ups only — please use a parent email.

meetHero.name: Noah
bioParagraphs: Noah is the star of Curious Comics — always asking "what if?" and turning everyday mysteries into epic adventures.
When he's not sketching the next cliffhanger, you'll find him building gadgets, reading everything he can find, and making sure Pixel doesn't get into too much trouble.

author.title: Written with Dad
bioParagraphs: Noah (9) writes the stories; Dad helps with layouts, lettering, and keeping the science fair villains scientifically plausible.
Every issue is a family lab project — part bedtime story, part STEM spark.
author.imageAlt: Noah and Dad at the drawing desk

formSecondary.headline: GET THE FREE COMIC!
formSecondary.description: Same list — drop your details again if you're on mobile and missed the first box!
formSecondary.disclaimer: We respect your inbox. Unsubscribe anytime.

footer.line: Join our adventure and see how curiosity can change the world!

formSubmit.successMessage: You're on the list! Check your email soon.
formSubmit.unavailableMessage: Signup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
formSubmit.demoLogNote: With instantAppId in data/config.json, signups go to InstantDB (entity comic_signups). If endpoint is also set, both run. With neither, the browser only logs a demo message.
